title: Double Sided Foam Tape – Heavy Duty Waterproof Mounting Tape 20mm X 3m - Strong Adhesive Foam Strips for Indoor & Outdoor Use, Ideal for Car, Wall, Home & Office Decor
features: Strong Adhesion: This 3M double sided tape offers a powerful, long-lasting hold, suitable for a range of applications, from hanging frames to securing carpets on both indoor and outdoor surface

Durable Foam Structure: Crafted with PE foam, this double sided foam tape provides excellent resistance to impacts, temperature changes, and moisture, ensuring secure attachment in various environments

Versatile Use: This double sided tape heavy duty is perfect for multiple tasks such as mounting photos, posters, securing lightweight items, and decorating cars, making it a reliable household essential
Waterproof & Weatherproof: With high resistance to water, this double sided sticky pads solution can be used in bathrooms or damp environments without compromising adhesion quality
Easy, Clean Application: Skip the mess of screws or nails – this strong double sided tape creates a seamless, smooth bond that keeps surfaces intact, saving time and effort
description: Experience the robust adhesion of our 3M double sided tape, designed to tackle a variety of mounting needs effortlessly. This double sided foam tape measures 20 mm x 3 m and uses PE foam material for enhanced durability, providing a firm hold on both indoor and outdoor surfaces. Resistant to water and high temperatures, it’s the ideal solution for home, office, or car decoration. Suitable for a wide range of applications, this double sided tape heavy duty is perfect for securely mounting photos, posters, and lightweight items on smooth walls, or for safeguarding carpets and mats. With an easy, clean application, you can avoid drilling, screws, and nails while achieving a virtually invisible bond.
